title: PokéHUN
description: This modpack is built for you to be able to play on the PokéHUN server.
body:
This Cobblemon modpack is built for you to be able to play on the PokéHUN server.
A Hungarian whitelisted Pokémon catching server, in which you are welcomed to join!

Taken inspiration from other Cobblemon-running servers this modpack was created.

*Side Note:* This modpack was created solely on that purpose so that you can easily join PokéHUN server.

**Csatlakozz a discord szerverünkre, ahol több infót megtudsz!**
----> https://discord.com/invite/VkcxuVau9h
